---
name: Feature Request
about: New capability or behavior change
labels: feature
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One sentence: what should exist that doesn't?

## Motivation

Why does this matter? Who benefits and how?

## Proposed Behavior

What should the system do differently? Be concrete.

## Spec

Will you write a spec before implementing?

- [ ] Yes — I will create `specs/[type]/[feature-name].md` before starting
- [ ] Needs discussion first

## Acceptance Criteria

How will we know this is done?

- [ ] [Observable outcome]
- [ ] [Observable outcome]
- [ ] Tests pass: `pytest tests unit_tests -v`

## Scope

What is explicitly NOT part of this request?

## Dependencies

Does this require other work first?
